title: The new front line: how war, oil and artificial intelligence are reshaping the world at once
standfirst: From Kyiv to the Strait of Hormuz, from London’s political anxieties to Silicon Valley’s latest AI alarms, this week’s news points to a world in which security shocks, market volatility and technological disruption are converging. The result is not one crisis but several, each amplifying the others, and each forcing governments to make decisions with consequences far beyond their borders.
